pipeline/python.name: pipeline/python
pipeline/python.prompt: Design the Python package API for hyperlink_button to match st.button signature (label, key, help, on_click, args, kwargs, disabled, use_container_width, type, icon) and return bool with st.button semantics (True only on click rerun). Use streamlit.components.v1.declare_component with path to frontend/build when present. Implement stable auto-key when key is None based on callsite, and store last_click_id in st.session_state. Provide exact contents for src/hyperlink_button/__init__.py and any helper modules, plus packaging config changes needed in pyproject.toml/hatchling to include frontend build assets.

pipeline/tests_docs.name: pipeline/tests_docs
pipeline/tests_docs.prompt: Propose minimal test strategy + docs for hyperlink_button component. Provide: (1) pytest unit tests for Python click edge + callback (mock component return), (2) Streamlit AppTest smoke test for example app, (3) Playwright e2e test that launches streamlit subprocess, clicks the component inside iframe, and asserts app output changes. Also propose README.md content and a detailed step-by-step PyPI publishing manual (docs/pypi-publish.md) including uv build, twine, API tokens, testpypi, versioning. Keep it minimal but exhaustive.

pipeline/frontend.name: pipeline/frontend
pipeline/frontend.prompt: Create a minimal Streamlit custom component frontend (v1 iframe) for a link-looking button. Return exact file tree + contents for: src/hyperlink_button/frontend/package.json, vite config if needed, tsconfig, src/index.tsx, src/HyperlinkButton.tsx, src/style.css. Requirements: renders a <button> styled as hyperlink; supports args label/help/disabled/use_container_width/type/icon; sends click counter via Streamlit.setComponentValue({click_id}); sets frame height; includes data-testid='hyperlink-button'. Keep dependencies minimal and avoid UI libraries.

pipeline/tests_docs2.name: pipeline/tests_docs2
pipeline/tests_docs2.prompt: Create minimal but complete tests+docs plan and provide exact file contents for: README.md, docs/pypi-publish.md, examples/app.py, tests/test_click_edge.py (unit tests with monkeypatch), tests/test_app_smoke.py (AppTest). For Playwright e2e, provide scripts/run_streamlit_for_e2e.py and tests_e2e/test_e2e_click.py plus how to install Playwright browsers. Keep dependencies minimal and no pinned versions. Use streamlit.testing.v1.AppTest.
